Additionally, memory scrubbing was implemented to correct and prevent the accumulation of CRAM faults over time, while error detection and correction codes (EDAC) were employed to protect volatile data stored in caches. The evaluation was validated through both fast, low-cost emulated fault injection and real heavy-ion irradiation experiments. Results show that the combination of DTMR, EDAC, and CRAM scrubbing at a reliability above 90% improves the expected mission image by 4.8× in emulation and 6.31× in irradiation.
title_zh: 基于SRAM型APSoC的多重容错技术实现可靠AI加速器设计
abstract_zh: 由于卷积神经网络（CNNs）在可编程片上系统（APSoCs）上的实现越来越多地应用于航天任务关键系统，其灵活性和并行性使其备受青睐，因此选择一种在可靠性、面积和功耗之间取得平衡的容错设计，对于应对辐射引起的故障和资源限制至关重要。然而，现有文献对在单一AI加速器中综合运用多种容错技术的研究仍十分有限，导致难以识别出最有效的策略。为解决这一问题，本文提出了一种可推广的设计流程，并将其应用于基于高层次综合（HLS）生成的ZynqNet加速器。ZynqNet实现了一个在SAT-6数据集上训练的四层CNN，用于航空图像分类。本研究旨在评估基于三模冗余（TMR）技术在不同架构粒度层次上应用的多种容错策略的影响，包括模块化TMR（MTMR）、粗粒度TMR（CGTMR）和分布式TMR（DTMR），重点针对现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）配置存储器（CRAM）中的位翻转故障。此外，还引入了内存擦洗（scrubbing）技术，以纠正并防止CRAM故障随时间累积；同时采用错误检测与纠正码（EDAC）保护缓存中存储的易失性数据。评估通过快速且低成本的模拟故障注入以及真实的重离子辐照实验两种方式验证。结果表明，在可靠性高于90%的前提下，DTMR、EDAC与CRAM擦洗相结合的方案，在模拟环境中使预期任务图像性能提升4.8倍，在辐照实验中提升达6.31倍。

title: Research on Software Development Quality Evaluation and Risk Prediction Algorithm Based on CMMI5 Model
authors: Zhang Baoliang, He Jian, Hui Chen, Sun Congrui
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Computer Communication, Networks and Information Science (CCNIS)
abstract: Addressing issues such as the lag in traditional software quality evaluation methods, reliance on experience for risk prediction, and underutilization of CMMI5 process data, this paper proposes an integrated software development quality evaluation and risk prediction algorithm system incorporating CMMI5 quantitative management principles. First, a three-dimensional evaluation model integrating “process maturity × quality characteristics × lifecycle stage” is constructed. Quantifiable metrics are extracted from CMMI5's key process areas, and a dynamic scoring algorithm based on sliding windows and exponential weighted moving averages (EWMA) is designed to enable real-time quality status monitoring and trend forecasting. Second, integrating LSTM neural networks with XGBoost models, the LAX ((LSTM-Attention-XGBoost)) hybrid prediction model incorporates attention mechanisms to focus on critical process phases. This model outputs risk probabilities, while SHAP values explain risk factor contributions to guide process improvement priorities. Experiments on 25 CMMI5-certified projects and over 15,000 weekly granularity data points demonstrate a significant negative correlation between quality scores and future defect density (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$r=-0.72, p<$</tex> 0.01). <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{p}<0.01$</tex>). The LAX hybrid model achieved an AUC-ROC of 0.93 in risk prediction, significantly outperforming traditional models. This research effectively bridges the causal chain between CMMI5 process execution and quality outcomes, providing theoretical foundations and practical tools for software organizations to achieve data-driven continuous improvement and proactive risk prevention.
title_zh: 基于CMMI5模型的软件开发质量评估与风险预测算法研究
abstract_zh: 针对传统软件质量评估方法滞后、风险预测过度依赖经验以及CMMI5过程数据利用率不足等问题，本文提出了一套融合CMMI5量化管理理念的软件开发质量评估与风险预测算法体系。首先，构建了“过程成熟度 × 质量特性 × 生命周期阶段”三维评估模型，从CMMI5的关键过程域中提取可量化指标，并设计基于滑动窗口与指数加权移动平均（EWMA）的动态评分算法，实现对软件质量状态的实时监控与趋势预测。其次，融合LSTM神经网络与XGBoost模型，提出LAX（LSTM-Attention-XGBoost）混合预测模型，引入注意力机制聚焦关键过程阶段，输出风险概率，同时利用SHAP值解析各风险因素的贡献度，指导过程改进的优先级决策。基于25个CMMI5认证项目及超过15,000个周粒度数据点的实验结果表明，质量评分与未来缺陷密度之间存在显著负相关关系（r = -0.72，p < 0.01）。LAX混合模型在风险预测中达到0.93的AUC-ROC值，显著优于传统模型。本研究有效打通了CMMI5过程执行与质量结果之间的因果链条，为软件组织实现数据驱动的持续改进与主动风险防控提供了理论依据与实用工具。

title: Using a Custom AI Chatbot Platform to Foster Higher-order cognitive thinking in Programming Education
authors: Otemis Madina Begymbetkyzy, Jelena Caiko
publish: 2025 IEEE 66th International Scientific Conference on Power and Electrical Engineering of Riga Technical University (RTUCON)
abstract: This article explores the potential for developing higher-order cognitive thinking in learners through the strategic teaching of programming languages. It demonstrates that such cognitive growth can be fostered and structured through the use of a custom-designed educational platform integrated with an AI-powered chatbot. This approach enables a gradual and measurable enhancement of cognitive skills while providing real-time assessment of students’ cognitive levels. Traditionally, identifying cognitive development required extensive manual coding and long-term research. However, by leveraging artificial intelligence capabilities alongside Bloom’s Taxonomy, this study introduces a method for automatically assessing learners’ cognitive levels in parallel with improving their programming proficiency. The findings offer instructors actionable insights into student performance and the opportunity to adjust teaching strategies accordingly. The paper also discusses practical applications and advantages of incorporating AI chatbots into the learning process.
title_zh: 利用定制化AI聊天机器人平台促进编程教育中的高阶认知思维
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了通过战略性地教授编程语言，培养学习者高阶认知思维的潜力。研究证明，借助一个专为教育设计、集成AI聊天机器人的平台，可以系统化地促进并构建这种认知发展。该方法不仅能够逐步提升学习者的认知能力，还能实现对认知水平的实时评估。传统上，识别认知发展需要大量手动编码和长期研究。然而，本研究结合人工智能技术与布卢姆认知分类学，提出了一种可自动评估学习者认知水平的方法，同时提升其编程能力。研究结果为教师提供了关于学生表现的可操作洞察，并使其能够据此调整教学策略。此外，本文还讨论了将AI聊天机器人融入学习过程的实际应用及其优势。

title: Multi-Objective Alpha Evolution for Hardware and Software Co-Design of Heterogeneous Multicore Systems
authors: Hai Yi, Shanzhu Xiao, Huamin Tao, Shao Deng
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on High Performance Computing, Big Data and Communication Engineering (ICHBC)
abstract: Aiming at the multi-objective optimization problem in hardware and software co-design for heterogeneous multicore systems, a Multi-Objective Alpha Evolution (MOALPHA) algorithm is proposed in this paper. This method uniformly models system architecture design and hardware/software multidirectional partitioning as a multi-objective optimization problem. Processor resources allocation, bus resources allocation, and task assignment are integrated into the same candidate solution through a segmented encoding strategy, the Alpha operator is employed for evolution, and non-dominated sorting and an elite retention mechanism are introduced to optimize the convergence and diversity of the solution set. Experimental results demonstrate that MOALPHA achieves remarkable convergence and diversity in its solution sets, effectively balances exploration and exploitation, and provides an effective approach for early design space exploration of heterogeneous multicore systems.
title_zh: 面向异构多核系统软硬件协同设计的多目标Alpha进化算法
abstract_zh: 针对异构多核系统软硬件协同设计中的多目标优化问题，本文提出了一种多目标Alpha进化（MOALPHA）算法。该方法将系统架构设计与软硬件多方向划分统一建模为多目标优化问题。通过分段编码策略，将处理器资源分配、总线资源分配及任务分配整合到同一候选解中，采用Alpha算子进行进化，并引入非支配排序与精英保留机制，以优化解集的收敛性与多样性。实验结果表明，MOALPHA在解集的收敛性和多样性方面表现优异，有效平衡了探索与开发，为异构多核系统的早期设计空间探索提供了一种有效方法。

title: Multi-Channel Spatial Representation Learning for FPGA Routability Prediction
authors: Lei Cai, Ning Xu
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Communication (EIECC)
abstract: Accurate routability prediction at the placement stage is crucial for efficient Field Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) physical design, because poor routability often leads to costly placement–routing iterations and prolonged design closure. Traditional approaches rely on fast but coarse congestion estimators that lack the capacity to model intricate spatial interactions among logic blocks, routing resources, and net topologies. Recent machine learning-based methods treat placement as an image and apply convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for routability forecasting; however, most of them use shallow networks and limited input representations. To address these limitations, we propose a deep learning framework based on ResNet that predicts continuous routability scores from a multi-channel composite representation. Our input encodes three complementary spatial feature groups, such as RUDY-based congestion map, density heatmaps, and device layout geometry, which jointly represent routing congestion, layout density, and geometric constraints. Leveraging pretrained ResNet weights and adapting the network for regression, the model captures hierarchical spatial patterns critical for accurate routability estimation. Experiments on commercial and open FPGA benchmarks demonstrate strong accuracy and improved generalization and scalability compared with conventional estimators and prior learning-based methods.
title_zh: 面向FPGA布线可布性的多通道空间表征学习
abstract_zh: 在可编程门阵列（FPGA）物理设计的布局阶段，精确的布线可达性预测对于提高设计效率至关重要，因为较差的布线可达性往往导致昂贵的布局-布线迭代以及设计收敛时间的延长。传统方法依赖于快速但粗略的拥塞估计算法，这些算法无法有效建模逻辑块、布线资源与网络拓扑之间的复杂空间交互关系。近年来，基于机器学习的方法将布局问题视为图像输入，并采用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行布线可达性预测；然而，大多数方法使用浅层网络结构和有限的输入表示方式。为克服上述局限，本文提出一种基于ResNet的深度学习框架，通过多通道复合表示来预测连续的布线可达性评分。我们的输入编码了三组互补的空间特征，包括基于RUDY的拥塞图、密度热力图以及器件版图几何信息，共同表征布线拥塞、布局密度和几何约束。利用预训练的ResNet权重，并对网络结构进行回归任务适配，该模型能够捕捉对准确布线可达性评估至关重要的层次化空间模式。在商用及开源FPGA基准测试上的实验结果表明，与传统估计算法及先前的基于学习的方法相比，本方法在准确性、泛化能力以及可扩展性方面均表现出显著优势。

title: Research on Compiler Fuzzing Based on Syntax-semantics Dual-Dimensional Classification
authors: Shiyu Wang, Lin Han, Mengyao Chen, Haoran Li
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Communication (EIECC)
abstract: Fuzz testing is an effective method for compiler testing, but existing tools generate test programs with low syntactic correctness due to a lack of program semantic awareness. To address this, this paper proposes a syntax-semantic aware gray-box fuzz testing method and designs the improved tool VarFuzz based on AFL: replacing AFL's character-level mutations with semantic mutations, and integrating a semantic distance matrix with Thompson sampling for dynamic operator probability allocation. Experiments show that, compared to AFL and GrayC, VarFuzz increases code coverage on GCC and LLVM compilers by approximately 10.46% and 6.2%, respectively.
title_zh: 基于语法-语义双维度分类的编译器模糊测试研究
abstract_zh: 模糊测试是编译器测试中一种有效的方法，但现有工具生成的测试程序由于缺乏对程序语义的理解，其语法正确性较低。为解决这一问题，本文提出了一种具备语法-语义感知能力的灰盒模糊测试方法，并基于AFL设计了改进工具VarFuzz：将AFL的字符级变异替换为语义级变异，同时引入语义距离矩阵与汤普森采样（Thompson sampling）实现动态操作符概率分配。实验结果表明，相较于AFL和GrayC，VarFuzz在GCC和LLVM编译器上的代码覆盖率分别提升了约10.46%和6.2%。

title: RustSFQ: A Rust-based Domain-Specific Language for Efficient SFQ Circuit Design
authors: Mebuki Oishi, Sun Tanaka, Shinya Takamaeda-Yamazaki
abstract: Single-flux-quantum (SFQ) circuits have a strict fan-out constraint, called I/O consistency. It requires every output to be connected to exactly one input. Despite this distinctive constraint, no dedicated tools for describing SFQ circuits exist, and SPICE netlists for analog circuits are still used, leading to reduced productivity. We propose RustSFQ, a domain-specific language embedded in Rust that statically verifies the I/O consistency by leveraging Rust’s ownership system. While gates are represented as functions, wires are represented as variables and managed under the ownership system. For example, if a wire is connected to multiple inputs, a corresponding variable is used multiple times, which is detected as an ownership error. RustSFQ enables immediate detection of design errors and supports abstraction over cell libraries, improving the efficiency of SFQ circuit design. As a case study, a 4-bit Reed–Solomon encoder was implemented using RustSFQ, and simulation confirmed correct operation at 10 GHz.
title_zh: RustSFQ：一种基于 Rust 的高效 SFQ 电路设计领域特定语言
abstract_zh: 单通量量子（SFQ）电路具有严格的扇出约束，称为输入/输出一致性。该约束要求每个输出必须恰好连接到一个输入。尽管存在这一独特限制，目前尚无专门用于描述SFQ电路的工具，设计者仍依赖模拟电路的SPICE网表，导致设计效率低下。为此，我们提出了RustSFQ——一种嵌入在Rust语言中的领域特定语言，通过利用Rust的所有权系统，静态验证输入/输出一致性。在RustSFQ中，逻辑门以函数表示，导线则以变量形式存在，并由所有权系统进行管理。例如，若某根导线连接到多个输入，则对应变量被多次使用，这将被系统识别为所有权错误。RustSFQ能够即时发现设计错误，并支持对单元库的抽象，显著提升了SFQ电路的设计效率。作为案例研究，我们使用RustSFQ实现了一个4位Reed–Solomon编码器，仿真结果验证了其在10 GHz频率下的正确工作性能。

title: An Automated Soft Error Evaluation Method for Single Event Effects
authors: Peng Zhang, Xin Chen, Yibo Sheng
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Communication (EIECC)
abstract: Space radiation-induced Single Event Effects (SEEs) pose a significant threat to circuit reliability, primarily because soft errors—such as Single Event Upsets (SEUs)—possess low energy thresholds and high probabilities of occurrence. To address this, this paper proposes an automated Register Transfer Level (RTL) SEE evaluation method. This approach facilitates the precise generation of faulty and reference circuits while enhancing the controllability and efficiency of SEU injection. The method is validated using a SHA-256 hash circuit containing 1,617 flip-flops, implemented in a TSMC 28nm process. A total of 1.73 million fault injection experiments were conducted. Experimental results indicate a total SEU error rate of 52.18%, comprising 449,741 Failure cases, 323,415 Silent cases, and 88,705 Latent cases. These findings demonstrate that the platform can efficiently evaluate the SEE sensitivity of large-scale circuits, providing robust support for the optimization of radiation-hardened designs.
title_zh: 单粒子效应的自动化软错误评估方法
abstract_zh: 空间辐射引起的单粒子效应（SEEs）对电路可靠性构成重大威胁，主要原因在于软错误（如单粒子翻转SEU）具有较低的能量阈值和较高的发生概率。为应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种自动化的寄存器传输级（RTL）SEEs评估方法。该方法能够精确生成带故障和无故障的电路模型，同时提升了SEU注入的可控性与效率。研究采用包含1,617个触发器的SHA-256哈希电路，在台积电28nm工艺下进行验证，共完成了173万次故障注入实验。实验结果表明，总SEU错误率为52.18%，其中包括449,741例失效类错误、323,415例隐性错误以及88,705例潜在错误。这些结果表明，该平台能够高效评估大规模电路的SEEs敏感性，为辐射加固设计的优化提供了有力支持。

title: Agent-Based Traffic Monitoring and Regulation System for SDN
authors: Xiaodan Guo, Falong Zhou, Weihao Du, Mengdie Deng, Xun Zhu, Juming Bao
publish: 2025 IEEE 8th International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (PRAI)
abstract: The management of modern networks is becoming increasingly complex, and while Software-Defined Networking (SDN) offers programmability, existing control mechanisms often lack flexibility and operational intuitiveness due to heavy reliance on manual configurations or opaque machine learning models. To address this limitation, we propose the indirect integration of a Large Language Model (LLM)-powered conversational agent into the SDN control loop, implementing the ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) paradigm as our core innovation to synergize natural language reasoning with concrete network operations. This agent utilizes a specialized toolkit that translates human conversational intents both into SQL queries (via a Text-to-SQL engine) for deep network state analysis and into REST API calls (through OpenFlow rule modifications) for real-time traffic regulation, validated through comprehensive emulation-based evaluation.
title_zh: 基于代理的软件定义网络交通监控与调控系统
abstract_zh: 现代网络的管理正变得日益复杂，尽管软件定义网络（SDN）提供了可编程性，但现有的控制机制往往因过度依赖手动配置或不透明的机器学习模型，而缺乏灵活性和操作直观性。为解决这一局限，我们提出将基于大语言模型（LLM）的对话式智能体间接集成到SDN控制环路中，以“推理+行动”（ReAct）范式为核心创新，实现自然语言推理与具体网络操作的协同。该智能体配备专用工具集，能够将人类的对话意图分别转化为SQL查询（通过文本到SQL引擎）以深入分析网络状态，以及转化为REST API调用（通过OpenFlow规则修改）以实现对网络流量的实时调控。该方案已通过全面的仿真评估得到验证。

title: A Hardware-Aware Methodology for Distributed In-Network Intelligence on FPGA-Based SmartNICs
authors: Fanny Spagnolo, Mattia Giovanni Spina, Stefania Perri, Antonio Iera, Pasquale Corsonello
abstract: Future network infrastructures will increasingly leverage artificial intelligence (AI) models for automation of internal management procedures and for service offering. To this aim, distributing learning capabilities within Programmable Data Planes (PDPs) can offer clear advantages, but at the cost of complex design challenges. In this paper, we introduce an effective methodology for distributing AI capabilities across PDP devices, considering hardware resource utilization and energy consumption. Experimental evaluations conducted on FPGA-based programmable platforms demonstrate that the proposed design, when applied to anomalous network traffic detection, attains very high precision, high throughput, and improved power efficiency compared to state-of-the-art solutions in the literature.
title_zh: 一种面向FPGA智能网卡的分布式网络内智能的硬件感知方法
abstract_zh: 未来的网络基础设施将越来越多地利用人工智能（AI）模型来实现内部管理流程的自动化以及服务的提供。为此，将学习能力分布到可编程数据平面（PDP）中可带来显著优势，但同时也伴随着复杂的设计挑战。本文提出了一种有效的方法，用于在PDP设备间分布AI能力，同时考虑硬件资源利用率和能耗问题。在基于FPGA的可编程平台上进行的实验评估表明，当应用于异常网络流量检测时，所提出的方案相较于文献中的最先进解决方案，能够实现极高的检测精度、高吞吐量以及更优的能效表现。

title: A Consistency-Oriented Verification Framework for Reliable Power Industry LLMs
authors: Binbin Wang, Lei Zhang, Youran Li, Naiwang Guo
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Communication (EIECC)
abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) in the power industry shows promise for intelligent grid operations and cybersecurity analysis, but practical adoption is hindered by hallucinations and factual inconsistencies in critical tasks. To enhance reliability, this paper proposes a consistency-oriented framework for power-industry LLMs. We apply a Factored Chain-of-Verification (CoVe) mechanism to a Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct model fine-tuned with LoRA on heterogeneous power-system data, enabling inference-time self-verification of generated claims. Experiments on a proprietary Power Network Security Vulnerability Analysis dataset show that our approach significantly improves performance: the CoVe-enhanced model achieves 75.65% accuracy in security summarization, outperforming the LoRA baseline by 3.02 % and the foundation model by 12.63 %. Parameter sensitivity analysis further indicates that a moderate sampling temperature (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{T}=\text{0. 4}$</tex>) combined with skeptical prompting is key to maximizing verification diversity and correction effectiveness.
title_zh: 面向可靠电力行业大模型的一致性导向验证框架
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在电力行业的部署展现出智能电网运行与网络安全分析的巨大潜力，但其在实际应用中仍受到幻觉现象和关键任务中事实性不一致的制约。为提升可靠性，本文提出一种面向一致性的电力行业LLM框架。我们基于在异构电力系统数据上使用LoRA微调的Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型，引入了一种分因子链式验证（Factored Chain-of-Verification, CoVe）机制，实现了生成内容在推理阶段的自我验证。在自有电力网络安全隐患分析数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型性能：经CoVe增强的模型在安全摘要任务中达到75.65%的准确率，相较于LoRA基线提升3.02%，较基础模型提升12.63%。参数敏感性分析进一步表明，适度的采样温度（T = 0.4）结合怀疑式提示（skeptical prompting）是最大化验证多样性与纠错效果的关键。

title: LaMAGIC: Advanced Circuit Formulations for Language-Model-based Topology Generation for Analog Integrated Circuits
authors: Chen-Chia Chang, Wan-Hsuan Lin, Yikang Shen, Guanglei Zhou, Yiran Chen, Xin Zhang
publish: ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems
abstract: None

title: The Effects of Simple and Elaborated GAI-Based Feedback on Primary School Students' Programming Performance and Computational Thinking
authors: Yaping Guo, Yi Zhang, Lufang Yu, Dengkang Chen, Ziwen Wei
publish: 2025 International Conference on Educational Technology Management (ICETM)
abstract: Computational thinking (CT) is a core literacy essential for talents in the intelligent era. Although programming learning is widely recognized as an effective means to cultivate CT, its practical impact is limited by the lack of adequate feedback mechanisms. Currently, generative artificial intelligence (GAI) offers new possibilities for improving programming feedback. However, there remains insufficient empirical evidence regarding which type of feedback supported by GAI is more effective. Given this, a six-week quasi-experiment was conducted in a fifth-grade Python programming class. It aimed to investigate whether there were differences in the effects of GAI-based simple feedback (GAI-SF) and GAI-based elaborated feedback (GAI-EF) on students' programming performance, CT, and cognitive load, among other dimensions. The results indicate that, compared to GAI-SF, (1) GAI-EF significantly enhanced students' understanding and internalization of Python knowledge, thereby improving their programming performance; (2) GAI-EF more effectively fostered the development of students' CT, particularly in core dimensions such as decomposition, algorithm design, and assessment; (3) GAI-EF induced a higher cognitive load during its provision. The findings of this study offer valuable insights for instructors, educational technology developers, and researchers planning to integrate GAI into programming instruction. It provides clear practical significance for optimizing the design of GAI-based feedback in programming education.
title_zh: 简单与复杂基于生成式人工智能的反馈对小学生编程表现及计算思维的影响
abstract_zh: 计算思维（CT）是智能时代人才必备的核心素养。尽管编程学习被广泛认为是培养计算思维的有效途径，但其实际效果受限于缺乏充分的反馈机制。目前，生成式人工智能（GAI）为改进编程反馈提供了新的可能。然而，关于GAI支持的哪种反馈类型更有效，仍缺乏充分的实证证据。针对这一问题，本研究在小学五年级的Python编程课程中开展了一项为期六周的准实验研究，旨在探讨基于GAI的简单反馈（GAI-SF）与基于GAI的详细反馈（GAI-EF）在学生编程表现、计算思维发展以及认知负荷等维度上的差异。研究结果表明：（1）相较于GAI-SF，GAI-EF显著提升了学生对Python知识的理解与内化，从而有效提高了编程表现；（2）GAI-EF在促进学生计算思维发展方面更具优势，尤其在分解、算法设计和评估等核心维度上表现突出；（3）GAI-EF在提供过程中引发了更高的认知负荷。本研究结果为教师、教育技术开发者及研究者在将GAI融入编程教学时提供了重要启示，对优化编程教育中GAI反馈的设计具有明确的实践意义。

title: Research on CAD Front-End and Back-End Interaction Methods and Systems Based on ServiceOriented Message Passing Mechanisms
authors: Zhining Wang, Zhen Xu, Liguo Yang, Kangcheng Luo, Xin Chen
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on High Performance Computing, Big Data and Communication Engineering (ICHBC)
abstract: This paper proposes a CAD frontend-backend interaction method and system based on a service message-passing mechanism, aiming to address the highly coupled logic between frontend and backend in existing CAD platforms, which makes it difficult to adapt to multiple frontend types. By considering the coexistence of CAD platforms in both desktop and cloud environments, the frontend-backend separation is achieved. A unified framework supports the operation of multiple frontends through a single set of code, enabling interactive free modeling and parametric modeling in multi-frontend environments. The proposed solution has been successfully applied in practice, yielding favorable results.
title_zh: 基于面向服务的消息传递机制的CAD前后端交互方法与系统研究
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于服务消息传递机制的CAD前端-后端交互方法与系统，旨在解决现有CAD平台中前后端逻辑高度耦合的问题，该问题导致难以适应多种前端类型。通过考虑CAD平台在桌面与云环境中的共存需求，实现了前后端的分离。统一框架通过一套代码支持多个前端的运行，从而在多前端环境中实现交互式自由建模与参数化建模。所提出的解决方案已在实际应用中成功落地，取得了良好的效果。

title: Toward Intelligent and Secure Satellite Communications: Agentic AI for Covert Semantics
authors: Zhaoxin Feng, Ruichen Zhang, Xiaoqi Qin, Chengwen Xing, Nan Zhao, Dusit Niyato, Naofal Al-Dhahir
abstract: With the rapid growth of satellite service, efficient and secure transmission in satellite networks has become a central challenge. To address it, semantic communication can improve the efficiency by conveying only the essential meaning of information, while covert communication can ensure the security by concealing the transmission behavior. However, existing solutions often treat these two objectives in isolation and lack intelligence for the joint optimization in a dynamic environment. In this article, we first provide a comprehensive overview of the integration of semantic communication and covert transmission in satellite networks, highlighting its representative applications and fundamental challenges. Then, we introduce the concept of large language model (LLM) enabled agentic AI with its capabilities and enabling technologies. Specifically, we propose an LLM-enabled agentic AI framework for covert semantic satellite communication to unify the semantic understanding, reinforcement learning (RL) based covert transmission and knowledge-driven reconstruction for intelligent and secure information delivery. We present a case study to demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach. Finally, open issues and future directions are discussed.
title_zh: 面向智能与安全的卫星通信：用于隐蔽语义的代理型人工智能
abstract_zh: 随着卫星服务的快速发展，卫星网络中高效且安全的传输已成为核心挑战。为应对这一挑战，语义通信可通过仅传输信息的核心含义来提升效率，而隐写通信则可通过隐藏传输行为来保障安全性。然而，现有解决方案往往将这两个目标孤立处理，在动态环境中缺乏联合优化的智能性。本文首先全面综述了语义通信与隐写传输在卫星网络中的融合，重点阐述其代表性应用及基础性挑战。随后，我们介绍了大语言模型（LLM）驱动的智能体人工智能（agentic AI）的概念，及其能力与支撑技术。具体而言，我们提出了一种基于LLM的智能体AI框架，用于实现隐蔽的语义卫星通信，该框架统一了语义理解、基于强化学习（RL）的隐蔽传输以及知识驱动的重建，以实现智能化与安全化的信息传输。我们通过一个案例研究展示了该方法的有效性。最后，本文探讨了当前存在的开放性问题及未来研究方向。

title: RESOLVE: Reasoning in Hyperdimensional Spaces With Relational and Object Level Features Using Vector Symbolic Processing
authors: Mohamed Mejri, Chandramouli Amarnath, Abhijit Chatterjee
abstract: Modern transformer-based encoder-decoder architectures struggle with reasoning tasks due to their inability to effectively extract relational information between input objects (data/tokens) without interference from object-level information. To address this, we propose RESOLVE, a neuro-vector symbolic architecture that first combines object-level features with relational information in high-dimensional spaces, using fast, efficient operations such as bundling (summation) and binding (Hadamard product). This allows both object-level features and relational representations to coexist within the same symbolic structure with minimal interference with one another while maintaining a high level of abstraction. RESOLVE is driven by a novel attention mechanism that operates in a bipolar high-dimensional space, allowing fast attention score computation compared to the state-of-the-art. By leveraging this design, the model achieves both low compute latency and memory efficiency. RESOLVE also offers better generalizability while achieving higher accuracy in partially relational reasoning tasks compared to state-of-the-art methods.
title_zh: 使用向量符号处理进行关系与对象层次特征的超维空间推理
abstract_zh: 基于现代Transformer的编码器-解码器架构在处理推理任务时面临挑战，原因在于其难以有效提取输入对象（数据/标记）之间的关系信息，而不会受到对象级信息的干扰。为解决这一问题，我们提出了RESOLVE——一种神经向量符号架构。该架构首先在高维空间中将对象级特征与关系信息相结合，采用快速高效的运算操作，如捆绑（求和）和绑定（哈达玛积）。这使得对象级特征与关系表征能够在同一符号结构中共存，彼此干扰极小，同时保持高度抽象性。RESOLVE采用一种新颖的注意力机制，该机制在双极高维空间中运行，相比现有最先进方法，能够实现更快的注意力分数计算。通过这种设计，模型在实现低计算延迟的同时，也具备出色的内存效率。此外，RESOLVE在部分关系推理任务中表现出更强的泛化能力，并在准确率上超越现有最先进方法。

title: Hardware Accelerator for 3D Convolutional Neural Networks Based on Dynamic Reconfiguration of FPGAs
authors: Qirui Chen, Xiyan Dong, Meini Tang, Chengying Chen, Zhixian Hou, Xinghua Wang, Xiaoran Li
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Communication (EIECC)
abstract: Three-dimensional convolutional neural networks (3D CNNs) are increasingly being used in many computer vision tasks. Deploying 3D CNNs on hardware is a challenge due to their high computational complexity and storage requirements. This brief presents an FPGA hardware accelerator for 3D CNNs that implements the well-known C3D architecture on the Zynq7035 platform through a dynamic reconfiguration scheme, with 10 acceleration IP cores designed for high performance based on the characteristics of the different layers of the C3D architecture. Compared to a high performance 4.2 GHz AMD CPU, the compute speed is 54.3 times faster and the power efficiency is 738 times better. The operating power consumption of the proposed accelerator is only 4 W.
title_zh: 基于FPGA动态重构的3D卷积神经网络硬件加速器
abstract_zh: 三维卷积神经网络（3D CNNs）在众多计算机视觉任务中正得到越来越广泛的应用。由于其计算复杂度高且存储需求大，将3D CNN部署到硬件平台面临挑战。本文提出了一种基于FPGA的3D CNN硬件加速器，通过动态重构方案在Zynq7035平台上实现了著名的C3D网络架构。该加速器设计了10个针对C3D架构不同层特征优化的加速IP核，以实现高性能。与高性能4.2 GHz AMD CPU相比，该加速器的计算速度提升了54.3倍，能效提高了738倍，且工作功耗仅为4 W。

title: Interactive SQL Tutoring with LLM-Based Data Augmentation
authors: Xinhui He, Haixi Yao, Chunlei Li, Xuxue Sun, Zhiqi Xu, Hao Zeng, Shaowei Chu, Baojun Zhang
publish: 2025 International Conference on Educational Technology Management (ICETM)
abstract: This study proposes a novel gamified learning approach for database education, integrating contextualized teaching methodology with detective-themed investigations. The approach combines theoretical knowledge of database query techniques with practical case-solving scenarios, enabling students to progressively master fundamental Structured Query Language (SQL) query methods through hands-on application. The virtual learning platform incorporates three key pedagogical strategies: (1) an open graphical interface design, (2) real-time feedback with error diagnostics, and (3) an AI-powered dynamic data generation mechanism, collectively enhancing authenticity and immersion in the learning experience. An exploratory study was conducted with 42 participants using post-intervention questionnaires and performance assessments. The results indicate that more than 90% of the students endorsed the gamified pedagogy. The approach was associated with self-reported improvements in learning motivation, knowledge mastery depth, and practical application capabilities, suggesting its potential as an innovative strategy for database education. Future work will develop customizable templates, fine-tune large language models (LLM) to enhance personalization and system stability, and explore broader applicability of this methodology.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的数据增强的交互式SQL辅导
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种新颖的游戏化数据库教学方法，将情境化教学法与侦探主题的探究活动相结合。该方法融合了数据库查询技术的理论知识与实际案例解决场景，使学生通过动手实践逐步掌握基础的结构化查询语言（SQL）查询方法。虚拟学习平台整合了三种关键教学策略：（1）开放式的图形化界面设计，（2）实时反馈与错误诊断功能，以及（3）由人工智能驱动的动态数据生成机制，共同提升了学习体验的真实感与沉浸感。研究对42名参与者进行了探索性实验，采用干预后问卷调查与表现评估相结合的方式。结果表明，超过90%的学生对游戏化教学法表示认可。该方法与学生自述的学习动机提升、知识掌握深度增强以及实践应用能力提高相关，显示出其作为数据库教育创新策略的巨大潜力。未来工作将致力于开发可定制的教学模板，优化大型语言模型（LLM）以提升个性化程度与系统稳定性，并进一步探索该方法在更广泛教学场景中的适用性。

title: Descriptor: ViewPoints Network Graph Structure Analysis Dataset (VPN)
authors: Guangxu Mei, Hongchang Zhang, Xueshen Li, Shijun Liu, Li Pan, Sheharyar Khan
abstract: This article presents the ViewPoints Network (VPN) dataset, a fine-grained academic graph dataset designed to support the analysis of viewpoint-level structures within scientific literature. Existing academic graph datasets mainly operate at the paper or author level and therefore capture only coarse relational patterns such as citations or co-authorship, leaving the semantic evolution of scientific ideas insufficiently represented. The VPN dataset addresses this gap by extracting 1,474,680 viewpoints from publication abstracts and encoding them as individual nodes with high-dimensional sentence embeddings. Similarity-based edges are constructed using multiple thresholds, enabling flexible formation of viewpoint graphs tailored to different analytical needs. The dataset spans eight research domains in computer science and provides structured metadata, embedding files, and multi-threshold adjacency matrices to facilitate diverse graph learning and semantic analysis tasks. All data are processed through a transparent pipeline that includes cleaning, viewpoint extraction using large language models, embedding generation, and similarity computation. By offering a more granular representation of academic discourse, the VPN dataset supports research on viewpoint clustering, semantic interaction, idea evolution, and fine-grained network analysis across scientific domains.
title_zh: 描述： 视角点网络图结构分析数据集 (VPN)
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了ViewPoints Network（VPN）数据集，这是一个细粒度的学术图数据集，旨在支持科学文献中观点层级结构的分析。现有的学术图数据集主要在论文或作者层面运作，因此仅能捕捉到诸如引用或合著等粗粒度的关联模式，未能充分反映科学思想的语义演化过程。VPN数据集通过从论文摘要中提取1,474,680个观点，并将其编码为具有高维句子嵌入的独立节点，弥补了这一空白。利用多个相似度阈值构建基于相似性的边，从而能够灵活地生成适应不同分析需求的观点图。该数据集覆盖计算机科学中的八个研究领域，提供结构化元数据、嵌入文件以及多阈值邻接矩阵，以支持多样化的图学习与语义分析任务。所有数据均通过一个透明的处理流程完成，包括数据清洗、基于大语言模型的观点提取、嵌入生成及相似性计算。通过提供学术话语更细粒度的表示，VPN数据集为观点聚类、语义交互、思想演化以及跨科学领域的细粒度网络分析研究提供了有力支持。

title: Leveraging Transformer Networks for Enhanced Detection of Hardware Trojans via Power Side-Channel Analysis
authors: Ayman Elshenawy, Khalil M. Abdelnaby, Abdurrahman A. Nasr, Mohamed Zaki
abstract: The proliferation of Hardware Trojans (HTs) poses a critical threat to the reliability and security of integrated circuits (ICs), particularly in safety and mission-critical domains. Conventional detection approaches either rely on destructive imaging or trusted golden chips, both of which are costly and limited in scalability. This study introduces a golden-chip-free, non-destructive framework for Hardware Trojan Detection (HTD) based on transformer architecture applied to Power Side-Channel (PSC) signals. The research contribution presents the first systematic performance comparison between decoder-only (GPT-like) and encoder-only (BERT-like) models, as well as full encoder–decoder transformer models, for time-series PSC analysis. To adapt these models to the hardware security domain, side-channel traces are normalized, reduced via principal component analysis, and embedded with positional encodings to preserve temporal structure. The framework is evaluated on the publicly available Trojan Power & EM Side-Channel dataset using 10-fold cross-validation. Results show that GPT-based and BERT-based models achieve 66.32% and 79.41% accuracy, respectively. While the full transformer network significantly outperforms them with 92.43% accuracy, 92.44% precision, 92.43% recall, and an F1-score of 92.31%. These findings demonstrate the potential of attention-based architectures to capture subtle variations in PSC signals without requiring a golden reference chip. The study contributes a reproducible and comparative benchmark for transformer-based HTD, offering a scalable pathway toward more robust and interpretable hardware security solutions.
title_zh: 利用Transformer网络通过功耗侧信道分析增强硬件木马检测
abstract_zh: 硬件木马（HTs）的泛滥对集成电路（IC）的可靠性与安全性构成了严重威胁，尤其是在安全关键和任务关键领域。传统的检测方法要么依赖于破坏性成像技术，要么需要可信的“黄金芯片”作为参考，这两种方法均成本高昂且难以扩展。本研究提出了一种无需黄金芯片、非破坏性的硬件木马检测（HTD）框架，基于Transformer架构对功耗侧信道（PSC）信号进行分析。研究首次系统性地比较了仅解码器（GPT类）、仅编码器（BERT类）以及完整的编码器-解码器Transformer模型在时间序列PSC分析中的性能表现。为使这些模型适用于硬件安全领域，研究对侧信道数据进行了归一化处理，通过主成分分析（PCA）进行降维，并引入位置编码以保留时间序列结构。该框架在公开的“木马功耗与电磁侧信道数据集”上进行了评估，采用10折交叉验证。实验结果表明，基于GPT和BERT的模型分别实现了66.32%和79.41%的准确率；而完整的Transformer网络显著优于二者，达到92.43%的准确率、92.44%的精确率、92.43%的召回率以及92.31%的F1分数。这些结果表明，基于注意力机制的架构能够在无需黄金参考芯片的情况下，有效捕捉PSC信号中的细微变化。本研究为基于Transformer的HTD提供了可复现且具有对比性的基准，为实现更强大、更可解释的硬件安全解决方案开辟了可扩展的新路径。

title: An Implementing Traffic Light Signal Control Verilog-Based System
authors: Xinyang Liu
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Computer Communication, Networks and Information Science (CCNIS)
abstract: With the continued expansion of urban intersections, flexible and reliable traffic-signal control has become essential for improving traffic flow and maintaining orderly intersection operations. Field-programmable gate array (FPGA)-based traffic-signal systems are well suited to these requirements, but conventional FPGA design workflows typically require manual digital-circuit design and Karnaugh-map (K-map) logic minimization-tasks that are both technically demanding and time-consuming. To accelerate the development process, this paper presents a Verilog generation framework implemented in Python and integrated with the Vivado toolchain. Given a user-specified truth table, the framework automatically produces synthesizable Verilog module files, corresponding simulation testbenches, and waveform outputs within Vivado, thereby obviating the need for manual logic simplification and low-level circuit design. By reducing implementation complexity and lowering the required learning investment, the proposed approach substantially shortens development time and improves engineering efficiency. The framework was validated through three iterative design-verification cycles: in each cycle, the generated simulation waveforms were checked against the original specifications and found to satisfy the design requirements. Experimental results indicate that the system can effectively reduce development difficulty and time cost for FPGA-based traffic-signal systems, offering practical support for the rapid deployment of intersection control infrastructure.
title_zh: 基于Verilog的交通灯信号控制实现系统
abstract_zh: 随着城市交叉口的持续扩展，灵活可靠的交通信号控制已成为提升交通流效率、保障交叉口有序运行的关键。基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的交通信号系统非常适合满足这些需求，但传统的FPGA设计流程通常需要手动进行数字电路设计以及卡诺图（K-map）逻辑化简——这些任务不仅技术要求高，而且耗时较长。为加速开发进程，本文提出了一种基于Python实现并集成至Vivado工具链的Verilog代码生成框架。该框架可根据用户指定的真值表，自动生成可综合的Verilog模块文件、对应的仿真测试平台以及在Vivado中生成的波形输出，从而无需人工进行逻辑化简和底层电路设计。该方法显著降低了实现复杂度和学习门槛，大幅缩短了开发周期，提升了工程效率。通过三次迭代式的设计-验证循环，对框架进行了验证：在每一轮循环中，生成的仿真波形均与原始设计规范一致，满足设计要求。实验结果表明，该系统能有效降低FPGA交通信号系统开发的难度与时间成本，为交叉口控制基础设施的快速部署提供了切实可行的技术支持。

title: CyberLog Analyst: A Real-Time Security Log Analysis Pipeline Powered by LLM - Architecture, Implementation, and Evaluation
authors: Mouhamadou Mame DIOP, Mamadou BA, Khalifa SYLLA, Samuel Ouya
publish: 2025 IEEE 8th International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (PRAI)
abstract: System log analysis is critical for detecting anomalies and ensuring cybersecurity, yet traditional methods struggle with large, heterogeneous, and evolving data. CyberLog Analyst is a modular real-time platform powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate interpretation and generate contextual diagnostics from diverse logs. Tested in a simulated SOC with synthetic attack scenarios, it achieved 91 % recall, 84 % precision, and an <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$87 \% ~\mathrm{F} 1$</tex>-score, outperforming rule-based detection in noisy conditions. The system offers improved accuracy, readability, and response time, while challenges remain regarding inference cost, log format sensitivity, and robustness to adversarial inputs.
title_zh: CyberLog 分析员：基于大语言模型的实时安全日志分析流水线——架构、实现与评估
abstract_zh: 系统日志分析对于检测异常和保障网络安全至关重要，但传统方法在处理大规模、异构且不断演化的数据时面临挑战。CyberLog Analyst 是一个基于大型语言模型（LLMs）的模块化实时平台，能够自动解析并从多种日志中生成具有上下文意义的诊断信息。在模拟安全运营中心（SOC）环境下，通过合成攻击场景测试，该系统实现了 91% 的召回率、84% 的精确率以及 87% 的 F1 分数，在噪声环境中表现优于基于规则的检测方法。该系统在准确性、可读性和响应速度方面均有显著提升，但仍面临推理成本高、对日志格式敏感以及对抗性输入鲁棒性不足等挑战。

title: Empowering IoT Security: Automated Identification of Standard Library Functions in RTOS Firmware with LLM and RAG
authors: Zhihan Zheng, Yu-an Tan, Zihan Chen, Zheng Lu, Weizhi Meng, Shuo Wang
abstract: Reverse engineering embedded firmware for Real-Time Operating Systems (RTOS) is a formidable challenge in Internet of Things security. The common practice of stripping symbolic information from firmware to optimize performance and storage makes identifying standard library functions exceptionally difficult, creating a significant bottleneck for functional analysis and vulnerability discovery. This paper introduces a novel, automated method for identifying these functions in RTOS firmware by leveraging Large Language Models. Our approach operates directly on raw binary code, requiring no symbolic or debugging information, and demonstrates broad generalizability across diverse hardware architectures and compilers. At its core, the method combines Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to enhance identification accuracy with a newly designed Adaptive Iterative Screening Algorithm (AISA), which optimizes analysis efficiency by prioritizing candidate functions based on a weighted score of call frequency, call depth, and address proximity to reduce token costs. We validated our method through rigorous experimentation on Zephyr RTOS firmware spanning nine architectures (e.g., ARM, MIPS, RISC-V). The results are compelling: our approach achieves a 90.59% accuracy rate in identifying standard library function names. Moreover, its application to commercial IoT firmware confirms its high efficiency, identifying functions significantly faster and more economically than traditional heuristic techniques. This work contributes a powerful, general-purpose, and cost-effective solution for automated firmware analysis.
title_zh: 赋能物联网安全：基于大语言模型与检索增强生成技术的实时操作系统固件中标准库函数自动识别
abstract_zh: 针对实时操作系统（RTOS）嵌入式固件的逆向工程是物联网安全领域的一项重大挑战。通常为了优化性能和存储空间，固件在发布时会剥离符号信息，这使得识别标准库函数变得极为困难，成为功能分析与漏洞发现过程中的主要瓶颈。本文提出了一种新颖的自动化方法，利用大语言模型（Large Language Models）来识别RTOS固件中的标准库函数。该方法直接作用于原始二进制代码，无需依赖符号信息或调试信息，且在多种硬件架构和编译器之间展现出广泛的泛化能力。其核心思想结合了检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）技术以提升识别准确率，并引入了一种新型自适应迭代筛选算法（Adaptive Iterative Screening Algorithm, AISA），通过综合考虑调用频率、调用深度和地址邻近度等指标，对候选函数进行加权评分，从而优先分析高价值函数，显著降低token消耗，提高分析效率。我们在涵盖九种架构（如ARM、MIPS、RISC-V）的Zephyr RTOS固件上进行了严格的实验验证，结果令人信服：该方法在识别标准库函数名称方面达到了90.59%的准确率。此外，将其应用于商用物联网固件时，也证实了其高效性——相比传统启发式方法，能够更快、更经济地完成函数识别。本研究为自动化固件分析提供了一种强大、通用且成本效益高的解决方案。

title: High-Performance Elliptic Curve Point Addition on Versal AI Engine for Multi-scalar Multiplication
authors: Ayumi Ohno, Kotaro Shimamura, Shinya Takamaeda-Yamazaki
abstract: Multi-Scalar Multiplication (MSM) is a primary computational bottleneck in modern cryptographic applications, especially zero-knowledge proofs. The Pippenger algorithm parallelizes MSM by decomposing it into numerous elliptic curve point additions (PADDs), but accelerating these operations on novel hardware like the Versal ACAP presents a significant challenge. This work explores the acceleration of PADDs on the Versal ACAP’s spatial array of 400 AI Engines (AIEs). While the SIMD-VLIW architecture of AIEs is ideal for the multiplication-heavy workloads in PADD, the complex 377-bit modular arithmetic, particularly carry propagation, demands architecture-aware optimization. We propose two key contributions: (1) algorithmic optimizations for carry propagation employing a carry-save-like technique to exploit VLIW and SIMD capabilities, and (2) a comparison of spatial mapping strategies and modular reduction algorithms to enhance intra- and intertask parallelism. Our approach achieves 567× speedup over the integrated CPU on the AIE evaluation board, utilizing 51.1% of the theoretical memory bandwidth.
title_zh: 基于Versal AI引擎的高性能椭圆曲线点加法在多标量乘法中的应用
abstract_zh: 多标量乘法（MSM）是现代密码学应用中的主要计算瓶颈，尤其是在零知识证明领域。Pippenger算法通过将MSM分解为大量椭圆曲线点加法（PADD）操作来实现并行化，但在新型硬件（如Versal ACAP）上加速这些操作仍面临重大挑战。本文研究了在Versal ACAP的400个AI引擎（AIE）空间阵列上加速PADD操作的方法。尽管AIE的SIMD-VLIW架构非常适合PADD中计算密集型的乘法任务，但复杂的377位模算术，尤其是进位传播，对架构感知的优化提出了高要求。本文提出两项关键贡献：（1）针对进位传播的算法优化，采用类似进位保存的技术，以充分利用VLIW和SIMD特性；（2）对比分析空间映射策略与模约减算法，以提升任务内和任务间的并行性。所提出的方法在AIE评估板上相比集成CPU实现了567倍的加速，同时利用了理论内存带宽的51.1%。

title: Multi-Information Fusion Knowledge Graph Representation Learning Method Based on Large Language Model
authors: Junjie Ma, Ruiyang Shang, Junpeng Bao, Yifeng Huang
publish: 2025 IEEE 8th International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (PRAI)
abstract: Knowledge graph has been widely applied in many artificial intelligence fields, but most of the current knowledge graph representation learning methods rely on graph structure information, and do not fully exploit the entity semantic background information and hierarchical structure information contained in the graph. As a result, when we face complex problems, there are issues such as high computational complexity, lack of interpretability, and low reasoning accuracy. Aiming at the problem of how to effectively utilize the entity semantic background information and hierarchical structure information in the knowledge graph, this paper proposes a multi-information fusion knowledge graph representation learning method LHKGE based on a large language model. The LHKGE enriches the semantic representation of entities in the knowledge graph by using the knowledge of the large language model itself. Our experimental results on popular knowledge graph datasets demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves accuracy in link prediction tasks, showcasing its superiority.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的多信息融合知识图谱表示学习方法
abstract_zh: 知识图谱已广泛应用于人工智能的诸多领域，但目前大多数知识图谱表示学习方法依赖于图结构信息，未能充分挖掘图中蕴含的实体语义背景信息和层次结构信息。因此，在面对复杂问题时，常出现计算复杂度高、可解释性差以及推理准确率低等问题。针对如何有效利用知识图谱中的实体语义背景信息与层次结构信息这一问题，本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的多信息融合知识图谱表示学习方法——LHKGE。该方法通过利用大语言模型自身的知识，丰富了知识图谱中实体的语义表示。在多个主流知识图谱数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在链接预测任务中显著提升了准确率，充分展现了其优越性。

title: cGenEDA: Code-Generation for Electronic Design Optimization
authors: Philipp Tremuel, Fernando Benites, Christoph Würsch, Ulf Hügel, Florian Wolf, Andreas Büchel, Efstratios Gavves
publish: ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems
abstract: None
title_zh: cGenEDA：面向电子设计优化的代码生成
abstract_zh: None
